positive: A central, symmetrical, stylized illustration of a celestial forest meeting a deep, crystal nebula. The design features majestic, interwoven flora with phosphorescent bioluminescent elements, casting an ethereal glow. The style is geometric neo-art nouveau mixed with detailed linework, using rich jewel tones (sapphire blue, emerald green, amethyst purple) set against a clean, deep midnight black background. Strong silhouette definition is key, ensuring elements are recognizable and pop off the fabric. The composition is centered and balanced, evoking mystery and wonder. High contrast, vector-illustration quality, perfect for textile printing.
negative: blurry, noise, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, low resolution, poor anatomy, extra limbs, messy, ugly, amateur, low contrast, gradients, realism, photography, 3d render
